description: Add a per-client `client_portal_visibility_groups` data structure keyed by tenant and client.
Add a `client_portal_visibility_group_boards` membership structure that maps each visibility group to its allowed boards.
Add a single-group assignment field or equivalent one-to-one assignment structure for contacts, where `NULL` means full access.
Keep existing contacts and portal users unrestricted by default after migration so no board visibility changes occur until an assignment is added.
Introduce a shared server-side resolver that computes the effective visible board set for a portal contact from contact assignment and group membership.
Ensure the effective board resolver enforces tenant and client scoping so contacts cannot resolve groups or boards outside their own client context.
Filter client portal ticket list results to allowed boards when a contact has an assigned visibility group.
Leave client portal ticket list behavior unchanged for contacts with no assigned visibility group.
Reject client portal ticket detail access when the requested ticket belongs to a board that is not visible to the current contact.
Require ticket-adjacent client portal detail loaders, such as ticket documents or comments, to inherit the same hidden-board guard.
Restrict client portal ticket creation board options and default board selection to the boards allowed by the assigned visibility group.
Reject client portal ticket creation requests that submit a board outside the effective visibility set.
Apply the same effective board filter to client portal ticket-backed dashboard counts or summaries that surface ticket data.
Add a client portal admin-only UI for listing per-client visibility groups with localized labels, counts, and empty states.
Add client portal admin create and edit flows for group name and board membership within the admin's own client.
Add client portal admin assignment controls that assign or clear a single visibility group for a contact in the same client.
Allow client portal admins to preconfigure visibility for a contact even when that contact does not yet have a portal user account, because assignment is contact-based.
Hide client portal group-management UI from non-admin portal users and deny access to the related admin actions server-side.
Extend the PSA contact portal tab so MSP staff can view and replace the effective visibility group for a contact.
Provide MSP CRUD for the same per-client visibility groups from the PSA-side flow.
Use last-write-wins behavior for MSP and client-admin assignment changes without introducing lock semantics in v1.
Block deletion of a visibility group that is still assigned to one or more contacts, returning a clear user-facing error.
Allow deletion of an unassigned visibility group.
Add all new client portal strings to every supported `client-portal.json` locale file using the repo's existing localization pattern.
